signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Hit $119.6 Million; Rakuten Integration Announced | YES | HIGH confidence**
U.S. spot XRP ETFs attracted $119.6 million in inflows—the strongest single-day intake since December 2025.[6] Concurrently, Rakuten Wallet integrated XRP into its Rakuten Pay system, enabling its 44 million users to convert XRP into loyalty points.[6] This represents a significant step toward mainstream re

signals.headline: Bitcoin Breaks Above $75,000 for First Time Since Mid-March | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Breaks Above $75,000 for First Time Since Mid-March | YES | HIGH confidence**
Bitcoin rallied to $75,000 on April 14, its highest level since mid-March, with enough force to liquidate a large chunk of short positions in a single session.[1] Solana rose 6.3% to $86.55 backed by strong DeFi volume and steady ETF demand.[1]

signals.headline: Ethereum Surges 8
signals.raw:
Ethereum Surges 8.6% to $2,377; On-Chain Activity Jumps 41% | YES | HIGH confidence**
Ethereum outperformed all major tokens with an 8.6% gain to $2,377, while on-chain transactions jumped 41% over the past week and ETH ETF flows turned positive.[1] This follows geopolitical de-escalation (Iran signalling peace talks) that lifted bearish pressure from the market.

signals.headline: SEC Roundtable Guidance Clarifies Crypto Interface Rules | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Roundtable Guidance Clarifies Crypto Interface Rules | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC clarified rules for crypto interfaces on April 15, 2026, potentially benefiting XRPL's native DEX.[6] This regulatory clarity could impact XRP and broader market sentiment around decentralized finance infrastructure.
